step_rationale: Activated-fibroblast/myofibroblast marker; associated with collagen remodeling in chronic MI.
mechanism: CTHRC1 marks activated fibroblasts driving extracellular matrix remodeling and plaque inflammation.

references.title: Macrophage and fibroblast trajectory inference and crosstalk analysis during myocardial infarction using integrated single-cell transcriptomic datasets.
